languages.text: "Если "Фаркир" — это та образина, которую я недавно прикончил{mf||а}, то, боюсь, поговорить с ним не удастся".

traits.locale_text: "Если "Фаркир" — это та образина, которую я недавно прикончил{mf||а}, то, боюсь, поговорить с ним не удастся".
"Если "Фаркир" — это та образина, которую я недавно прикончил{mf||а}, то, боюсь, поговорить с ним не удастся".

languages.text: "If 'Farkir' was the freak I recently dispatched, I am afraid you will not be able to talk to him."
languages.original_text: "Если "Фаркир" — это та образина, которую я недавно прикончил{mf||а}, то, боюсь, поговорить с ним не удастся".

traits.locale_text: "If 'Farkir' was the freak I recently dispatched, I am afraid you will not be able to talk to him."
"If 'Farkir' was the freak I recently dispatched, I am afraid you will not be able to talk to him."
"If 'Farkir' was the freak I recently dispatched, I am afraid you will not be able to talk to him."

languages.text: "Wenn es sich bei 'Farkir' um den Freak handelt, den ich vor kurzem losgeschickt habe, fürchte ich, dass Sie nicht mit ihm sprechen können."
languages.original_text: "If 'Farkir' was the freak I recently dispatched, I am afraid you will not be able to talk to him."

languages.text: "Si 'Farkir' est le monstre que j'ai récemment envoyé, je crains que vous ne puissiez pas lui parler.
languages.original_text: "If 'Farkir' was the freak I recently dispatched, I am afraid you will not be able to talk to him."

languages.text: "如果'法基尔'是我最近派出去的怪人，恐怕你就无法和他交谈了。"
languages.original_text: "If 'Farkir' was the freak I recently dispatched, I am afraid you will not be able to talk to him."

languages.text: "Si 'Farkir' era el engendro que despaché hace poco, me temo que no podrás hablar con él".
languages.original_text: "If 'Farkir' was the freak I recently dispatched, I am afraid you will not be able to talk to him."

languages.text: "ファーキール "が最近私が派遣したフリークだとしたら、残念ながら彼と話すことはできないだろう。
languages.original_text: "If 'Farkir' was the freak I recently dispatched, I am afraid you will not be able to talk to him."

languages.text: "Eğer 'Farkir' kısa süre önce gönderdiğim ucubeyse, korkarım onunla konuşamayacaksınız."
languages.original_text: "If 'Farkir' was the freak I recently dispatched, I am afraid you will not be able to talk to him."
